summary: Ukrainian forces destroyed an American M1126 Stryker armored personnel carrier in the Dnipropetrovsk region using a fiber-optic FPV drone "KVN" followed by a loitering munition "Lancet." Russian forces are increasing FPV drone range to approximately 65 km, using aerial "mother drones" or BEK launches, while Ukrainian forces are beginning to adopt similar tactics. The "Rubicon" Center reported over 22,000 enemy target destructions, with unmanned systems comprising 35.9% of destroyed targets, and documented operations including the destruction of Ukrainian armored groups and fixed-wing UAVs.
